description: Two-document NTSB real-world accident investigation reports for Prethinker transfer testing. One aviation accident (Robinson R44 II), one marine accident (towing vessel capsizing). No invented content; all source documents are official public NTSB records.
purpose: Real-world messy documents for testing Prethinker's ability to extract structured facts from complex investigative narratives with incomplete information, competing evidence, and source limitations.

documents.title: Robinson Helicopter R44 II Accident, Bluestem, Washington
Capsizing and Sinking of Towing Vessel Baylor J. Tregre

file_structure.ntsb_001/source.md: Faithful markdown conversion of source PDF
file_structure.ntsb_001/oracle.jsonl: 25 answers with supporting spans and difficulty
file_structure.ntsb_001/provenance.md: Source verification and data quality notes
file_structure.ntsb_002/source.md: Faithful markdown conversion of source PDF
file_structure.ntsb_002/oracle.jsonl: 25 answers with supporting spans and difficulty
file_structure.ntsb_002/provenance.md: Source verification and data quality notes

data_discipline.source_authenticity: Real public documents; no invented content
data_discipline.extraction_fidelity: Faithful conversion preserving structure, tables, and narrative organization
data_discipline.answer_grounding: All answers reference supporting source spans; no external knowledge injected
data_discipline.oracle_format: JSONL with id, source_id, category, reference_answer, supporting_source_spans, difficulty
data_discipline.messy_reality: Documents preserve original messiness: incomplete investigations, competing evidence, source limitations, uncertainties

known_caveats: ntsb_001: Preliminary report; probable cause not determined; investigation ongoing
ntsb_002: Marine final report; weather stations 22-27 nm from casualty site; salvage operations modified wreckage before examination
Both: Some phenomena (storm type, exact wind speeds) not definitively confirmed despite crew observations
Both: Crew recall and communication chains introduce inherent uncertainty
